calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Candice Yount, CSR# 2737. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-29-2002 Continued To Jul-22-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/22/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Kent Gubbine. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2002 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-28-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Donald Hopkins for failure to file proof of service, obtain an answer(s) from or enter default(s) against defendant(s), is scheduled today.
There being no appearance or a response to the Order to Show Cause. Court ordered Plaintiff in Propria Persona sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/28/2002 at 10:30 AM, in department 212. OSC for failure to file proof of service, obtain an answer(s) from or enter default(s) against defendant(s). Court to give notice. Proceedings reported by: Lesley Schnider. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2001 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-28-02 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
